title: bZx - REKT
relevance_summary: Phishing attack leading to contract control and token draining

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds to external addresses after compromising a wallet

vulnerable_contracts: bZx contracts on polygon | bsc | ethereum
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sends funds to external addresses after compromising a wallet
summary: A bZx developer fell victim to a phishing attack, compromising their personal wallet and gaining control over bZx’s Polygon and BSC deployments. The hacker drained the contracts of BZRX and then sent stolen tokens to Ethereum to borrow other assets.
